name: multiplai
description: Multiplai — a suite of Claude Code plugins for memory, context, and workflow. Context manager is the first; more plugins follow.

plugins.name: multiplai-context
plugins.description: Context routing, continuous learning, session awareness, and memory management for Claude Code.

plugins.name: multiplai-pm
plugins.description: Product-management skill pack: JTBD synthesis, persona codification, PR/FAQ, strategy memos, job applications, landing pages.

plugins.name: multiplai-writing
plugins.description: Content creation toolkit: briefs, drafts, copy editing, LinkedIn posts, image prompts.

plugins.name: multiplai-research
plugins.description: Research skill pack: code-driven deep research pipeline, insight extraction, structured interviewing.

plugins.name: multiplai-dev
plugins.description: Developer skill pack: spec-driven builds, code/security review, refactoring, walkthroughs, e2e tests, cloud ops, skill authoring.

plugins.name: multiplai-media
plugins.description: Media skill pack: audio transcription, YouTube transcripts, screen-recording demo videos, diagrams, host-browser automation.

plugins.name: multiplai-messaging
plugins.description: Messaging skill pack: read/search/post Slack as yourself, and search/read/draft Gmail (never sends).
